note: Content index (scrolling editorial feed). fit_one_screen (#4) excluded from the mean (N/A). All 3 residual contrast 'failures' are PART badges — the collector's alpha-compositing artifact (scores text against full-strength gold, not the 14% tint); true rendered ratio 5.18 -> AA pass, so contrast scores 2. whitespace_ratio is a leaf-sum approximation insensitive to vertical padding; the real density win is docHeight 1971 -> 1803 (-168px / -8.5%).

breathing_room.note: metric flat (leaf-sum approx); true win is -168px docHeight. Editorial airiness acceptable; band is a policy choice.

applied_fixes: Contrast: --fresh-muted #6b7b6b -> #586858; .fi-part-badge color #8a6a1c -> #7a5d18 (AA on the 14% gold tint).
Compactness: removed redundant masthead subtitle; tightened card padding (1.05/1.2 -> 0.85/0.95rem), list gap (1 -> 0.7rem), cluster padding + body gap, intro margins. docHeight -168px.
Economy: consolidated 5 micro-label sizes (0.64-0.72rem) to a single 0.7rem eyebrow size (distinct sizes 11 -> 7).
